Package com.orasaka.gateway.dto

package com.orasaka.gateway.dto
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.orasaka.gateway
     
    com.orasaka.gateway.config
     
    com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
     
    com.orasaka.gateway.service
     
    com.orasaka.gateway.support
     
  • Class
    Description
    AuthContracts
    Group of immutable authentication data contracts for the REST ingress layer.
    AuthContracts.LoginRequest
    Request data containing credentials.
    AuthContracts.OAuthRequest
    Request data containing an external OAuth2 identity token for the Token-Exchange pattern.
    AuthContracts.RegisterRequest
    Request data containing registration details.
    AuthContracts.VerifyTokenRequest
    Request payload for verifying account tokens.
    AuthResponse
    Strongly-typed authentication response DTO for the REST ingress layer.
    RegisterResponse
    GraphQL-compatible result record for the register mutation, mapping to the schema's type RegisterResult { user: User, error: String }.
    UserDescriptor
    GraphQL-compatible DTO record mapping exactly to the type User in the schema.
